description_fr: Super-héros, méchants, films, comics. L'univers Marvel et DC en 15 questions.
description_en: Superheroes, villains, films, comics. The Marvel and DC universes in 15 questions.

questions.question_fr: Quelle est la véritable identité de Spider-Man ?
questions.explanation_fr: Peter Parker, créé par Stan Lee et Steve Ditko en 1962.
questions.explanation_en: Peter Parker, created by Stan Lee and Steve Ditko in 1962.

questions.question_fr: Qui est le Joker dans le film The Dark Knight (2008) ?
questions.question_en: Who plays the Joker in The Dark Knight (2008)?
questions.explanation_fr: Heath Ledger a remporté l'Oscar à titre posthume pour ce rôle.
questions.explanation_en: Heath Ledger won the Oscar posthumously for this role.

questions.question_fr: Iron Man (2008) est le premier film de l'univers cinématographique Marvel (MCU).
questions.question_en: Iron Man (2008) is the first film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU).
questions.explanation_fr: Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) a lancé le MCU le 2 mai 2008.
questions.explanation_en: Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) launched the MCU on May 2, 2008.

questions.question_fr: Quelle est la planète d'origine de Superman ?
questions.explanation_fr: Superman vient de Krypton, planète détruite. Sa kryptonite est mortelle pour lui.
questions.explanation_en: Superman comes from Krypton, a destroyed planet. Kryptonite is fatal to him.

questions.question_fr: Combien d'Avengers originaux ont fondé l'équipe ?
questions.question_en: How many original Avengers founded the team?
questions.explanation_fr: Les 6 originaux MCU : Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, Hawkeye.
questions.explanation_en: MCU's 6 originals: Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, Hawkeye.

questions.question_fr: Bruce Banner se transforme en ___ quand il est en colère.
questions.question_en: Bruce Banner transforms into the ___ when angry.
questions.explanation_fr: Bruce Banner devient le Hulk après une exposition aux rayons gamma.
questions.explanation_en: Bruce Banner becomes the Hulk after exposure to gamma rays.

questions.question_fr: Quel acteur a joué Wolverine dans 9 films ?
questions.question_en: Which actor played Wolverine in 9 films?
questions.explanation_fr: Hugh Jackman a joué Wolverine de 2000 à 2017 (Logan), puis dans Deadpool & Wolverine (2024).
questions.explanation_en: Hugh Jackman played Wolverine from 2000 to 2017 (Logan), then in Deadpool & Wolverine (2024).

questions.question_fr: Marvel Comics a été fondée avant DC Comics.
questions.question_en: Marvel Comics was founded before DC Comics.
questions.explanation_fr: Faux. DC est né en 1934 (sous le nom National Allied Publications), Marvel en 1939 (Timely Comics).
questions.explanation_en: False. DC was founded in 1934 (as National Allied Publications), Marvel in 1939 (Timely Comics).

questions.question_fr: Qui a tenu le marteau Mjolnir avant Thor dans le MCU ?
questions.question_en: Who wielded Mjolnir before Thor in the MCU?
questions.explanation_fr: Odin (père de Thor) a possédé Mjolnir avant lui. Vision le soulève dans Avengers 2.
questions.explanation_en: Odin (Thor's father) possessed Mjolnir before him. Vision lifts it in Avengers 2.

questions.question_en: How does Bruce Wayne (Batman) make his fortune?
questions.explanation_fr: Bruce hérite de Wayne Enterprises, conglomérat fondé par ses parents.
questions.explanation_en: Bruce inherits Wayne Enterprises, a conglomerate founded by his parents.

questions.question_fr: Le grand méchant violet de l'univers Marvel s'appelle ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Thanos cherche les Pierres d'Infinité dans la saga Avengers.
questions.explanation_en: Thanos seeks the Infinity Stones in the Avengers saga.

questions.question_fr: Captain America a été congelé pendant environ 70 ans dans la glace.
questions.question_en: Captain America was frozen in ice for about 70 years.
questions.explanation_fr: Steve Rogers a été congelé en 1945 et retrouvé en 2011-2012 dans le MCU.
questions.explanation_en: Steve Rogers was frozen in 1945 and found in 2011-2012 in the MCU.

questions.question_fr: Qui est le narrateur de Deadpool ?
questions.explanation_fr: Deadpool est connu pour briser le 4e mur, parlant directement au public.
questions.explanation_en: Deadpool is known for breaking the 4th wall, speaking directly to the audience.

questions.question_fr: Quelle ville fictive est protégée par Batman ?
questions.question_en: Which fictional city does Batman protect?
questions.explanation_fr: Gotham City pour Batman. Metropolis pour Superman.
questions.explanation_en: Gotham City for Batman. Metropolis for Superman.

questions.question_fr: Le bouclier de Captain America est fait en ___.
questions.question_en: Captain America's shield is made of ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Le vibranium provient du Wakanda (royaume de Black Panther).
questions.explanation_en: Vibranium comes from Wakanda (Black Panther's kingdom).
